overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Mirage showing a hooded protagonist walking through a sunlit historical Islamic city. The character traverses stone promenades, passes along a canal with moored boats, and enters a building with an ornate courtyard.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated stone promenade overlooking palace complex

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along elevated stone pathway toward the palace complex

notable_agents.action: woman in dark robes walking ahead of ego toward the palace

entered.detail: large sandstone palace with central dome and arched windows
tall date palms lining the walkway
low stone wall bordering the elevated path

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sunlit elevated stone walkway with the protagonist walking toward a grand palace complex. Palm trees line the left side while a stone railing borders the right. The palace dome dominates the horizon as the character moves through scattered pedestrians.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza transitioning to canal waterfront

events.description: descends from elevated promenade to canal-side walkway

agents.ego_description: moving down toward the water's edge through a populated plaza area

entered.detail: greenish canal water with lily pads visible along the edge
arched stone bridge spanning the canal in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character descends from the elevated walkway into a bustling plaza approaching a canal. The palace shifts to the left as the canal water and a distant stone bridge come into view on the right. The ground levels out to a waterfront promenade.

events.description: slows to navigate narrow path along canal edge

agents.ego_description: navigating along the water's edge past moored boats and small groups

notable_agents.action: group of robed figures standing and conversing by the water's edge

entered.detail: long wooden skiff moored along the canal edge
eroded sandstone cliff with sparse vegetation

segments.scene_description: Walking along the canal edge, the character passes wooden boats moored on the right while the stone bridge moves to the left. The path narrows as sandstone embankments rise on the far side of the water. Small groups of NPCs stand by the water conversing.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone staircase leading to grand building entrance

events.description: approaches carved entrance doorway of building

agents.ego_description: climbing wide stone steps toward an ornate building entrance

entered.detail: broad sandstone steps leading up to building entrance
ornate stone doorway with intricate geometric patterns
large ceramic planter with flowering plants flanking the stairs

segments.scene_description: Leaving the canal behind, the character ascends a broad stone staircase toward a grand building entrance. The carved stone doorway features intricate geometric patterns, flanked by decorative planters. The canal and bridge disappear from view as the character climbs.

scene_state.functional_zone: interior riad courtyard with central fountain

events.description: enters dimly lit corridor from bright exterior
emerges from corridor into sunlit interior courtyard

agents.ego_description: passing through entrance corridor into a garden courtyard with a central fountain

notable_agents.action: robed man exiting the building through the entrance corridor

entered.detail: narrow passage with intricate tilework and patterned carpet
multi-tiered stone fountain in the center of the garden
rounded stone columns supporting the upper gallery

segments.scene_description: The character enters a dimly lit corridor with ornate tile walls, then emerges into a bright interior courtyard. A central fountain anchors the garden space, surrounded by arcade columns and potted plants. The lighting shifts from dim to bright as the character moves from the corridor into the open courtyard.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an elevated stone promenade toward a bustling waterfront canal. It begins on a sunlit walkway where the protagonist moves toward a grand palace dome on the horizon, flanked by palm trees and a stone railing. As the character descends from the elevation, the palace shifts to the left and the scene opens up into a wide plaza that leads toward the water. The camera then follows the character onto a waterfront promenade, where the view expands to reveal a distant stone bridge and wooden boats moored along the right. Finally, the path narrows against rising sandstone embankments as the character passes small groups of people conversing by the canal's edge.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sunlit waterfront up into the secluded, bright interior of a grand estate. It begins as the character leaves the canal behind, ascending a broad stone staircase toward a grand entrance adorned with intricate geometric carvings and decorative planters. As the character passes through the carved doorway, the scene shifts into a dimly lit corridor lined with ornate tile walls. The camera then emerges from the shadows into a brilliant interior courtyard, where the lighting transforms from dim to bright. This open space finally reveals a central fountain anchored within a garden of arcade columns and potted plants.
